6b74396b-3fd8-47a3-8bef-ccc096325d46.title: DOM Events
6b74396b-3fd8-47a3-8bef-ccc096325d46.body:
The browser. Raw pointer, keyboard, and wheel events. Entry point for all user interaction.

**Emits:** pointerdown, pointermove, pointerup, keydown, wheel, blur, focus

foo bar

799b8cad-a25b-4a0f-8a4d-1c7b93cfaa85.title: Cactus: useViewport
799b8cad-a25b-4a0f-8a4d-1c7b93cfaa85.body:
d3-zoom on container element.

**Input:** wheel, mousedown (filtered by `[data-no-pan]`)
**Signal:** `transform()` → `{ x, y, k }`
**Consumers:** Canvas CSS transform, edge SVG transform, screenToCanvas()

4ddadbdd-3770-49f5-b4cf-609cdd710951.title: Cactus: useNodeDrag
4ddadbdd-3770-49f5-b4cf-609cdd710951.body:
Pointer math for node dragging.

**Input:** pointerdown (filtered by `handleSelector: [data-drag-handle]`)
**Attaches:** global pointermove/pointerup on window
**Emits:** `onDragStart(nodeId)`, `onDrag(nodeId, dx, dy)`, `onDragEnd(nodeId)`
**Signal:** `draggingNodeId()`
**Key:** delta divided by `zoomScale()` for zoom-corrected movement

100f1166-882d-4251-8eaa-5fad88231e98.title: Cactus: useSelection
100f1166-882d-4251-8eaa-5fad88231e98.body:
Node selection state.

**Input:** `onNodePointerDown(nodeId, event)` — called from NoteNode
**Logic:** shift/ctrl = toggle/add, plain click = replace
**Signal:** `selectedIds()`, `isSelected(id)`
**Consumers:** NoteNode outline style, delete handler

ca9ea797-4881-4f52-b128-5d73d4ef5395.title: Cactus: useNodeResize
ca9ea797-4881-4f52-b128-5d73d4ef5395.body:
Mirrors useNodeDrag pattern for resize.

**Input:** pointerdown on resize handle
**Emits:** `onResizeStart`, `onResize(nodeId, dw, dh)`, `onResizeEnd`
**Signal:** `resizingNodeId()`

60af37f0-99d4-4595-8e4c-b281295c0173.title: Cactus: useConnectionDrag
60af37f0-99d4-4595-8e4c-b281295c0173.body:
Edge creation via drag from ConnectionHandle.

**Input:** pointerdown on ConnectionHandle
**Signal:** `connectionDragState()` — source node, current screen coords
**Output:** `onConnect({ source, target })` callback
**Consumers:** connection preview SVG line

e1856415-023d-4e33-a84b-1374d8f1a833.title: Client: doc signal
e1856415-023d-4e33-a84b-1374d8f1a833.body:
The central document state.

`const [doc, setDoc] = createSignal<Document | null>(null)`

Contains all notes (positions, sizes, content) and all edges. Single source of truth for persisted state.

**Written by:** loadDoc (API fetch), setDoc (optimistic updates)
**Read by:** mergedNotes memo, renderEdges, CanvasContent props, topLevelNotes

f3d00302-4640-4aab-9051-4ba298147db3.title: Client: livePositions / liveSizes
f3d00302-4640-4aab-9051-4ba298147db3.body:
Ephemeral signals for in-flight drag/resize.

`const [livePositions, setLivePositions] = createSignal<Map>()`
`const [liveSizes, setLiveSizes] = createSignal<Map>()`

**Written by:** onDrag callback, onResize callback
**Cleared on:** onDragEnd, onResizeEnd
**Read by:** mergedNotes memo

These overlay doc state during interaction — DOM sees smooth movement without waiting for API.

d7899a40-255c-406d-b9cd-0dab8fe99709.title: Client: mergedNotes memo
d7899a40-255c-406d-b9cd-0dab8fe99709.body:
`createMemo` that fuses persistent + ephemeral state.

```
mergedNotes = doc().notes
  + livePositions() overlay
  + liveSizes() overlay
```

**Consumers:** renderEdges (FreeformEdge props), renderNote (NoteNode x/y/w/h)

This is the single reactive source for all spatial rendering. Fires on any change to doc, livePositions, or liveSizes.

d2b7c152-5e2b-42fe-b575-de85edfcd3ec.title: Client: drag callbacks
d2b7c152-5e2b-42fe-b575-de85edfcd3ec.body:
CanvasView.tsx:156-231. Bridge between cactus hooks and client state.

**onDragStart:** capture baseline from doc → dragBaseMap
**onDrag:** base + delta → setLivePositions
**onDragEnd:** read final from livePositions → setDoc + postAction('node/move') → clear livePositions

Also handles ctrl+drag nesting: findDropTarget → nest/unnest API calls.

27824539-7691-4af2-85bf-f345a0aa2154.title: CodeMirror: EditorView
27824539-7691-4af2-85bf-f345a0aa2154.body:
Created once per MarkdownEditor via `createCodeMirror()`.

Owns its own DOM (contenteditable), internal state, cursor, selection. Extensions configured via Compartments.

**Custom dispatch:** intercepts transactions, calls /usage`onValueChange(doc.toString())` on docChanged
**Extensions:** markdown, livePreview, markdownTheme, history, keymap, lineWrapping, blur handler

f43c38d2-20f5-4e17-a8b8-06270222de87.title: CodeMirror: controlled value sync
f43c38d2-20f5-4e17-a8b8-06270222de87.body:
`createEditorControlledValue(editorView, () => props.value)`

Two-way binding between CM local state and Solid props:

**Inbound:** when `memoizedCode` changes and editor not focused → dispatch full doc replacement
**Outbound:** CM dispatch → onValueChange → 500ms debounce → props.onChange → setDoc

**Guard:** `view.hasFocus` check prevents overwriting during active editing

6f1bf129-805c-4c0a-97a5-e12c2e871b49.title: CodeMirror: livePreview
6f1bf129-805c-4c0a-97a5-e12c2e871b49.body:
ViewPlugin that renders markdown as you type.

Rebuilds decorations on `docChanged`, `selectionSet`, `viewportChanged`.

**Hides:** header marks, emphasis marks, code marks, list marks (on non-cursor lines)
**Replaces:** task markers with checkbox widgets

Uses `syntaxTree(state)` — Lezer parser runs async, can trigger delayed decoration rebuilds.

fca15463-cb37-4446-af5a-54e78b2cb54a.title: Server: REST API
fca15463-cb37-4446-af5a-54e78b2cb54a.body:
Dumb storage. `postAction(action, params)` → POST /api/{action}.

**Endpoints:** node/move, node/resize, note/create, note/update, note/delete, edge/connect, edge/disconnect, edge/relabel, nest, unnest
**Read:** GET /api/document/{path}

**Pattern:** Client does optimistic update via setDoc FIRST, then fires postAction. On failure → loadDoc() to resync.

e0e54c2e-9eb5-4a12-9685-5f2df6ab7845.title: Server: File Watch
e0e54c2e-9eb5-4a12-9685-5f2df6ab7845.body:
WebSocket at /ws/watch.

Notifies client when backing file changes on disk (external edit, git pull).

**Message:** `{ event: "changed", path }`
**Client response:** `loadDoc()` → fresh GET → `setDoc()`

8eeedefa-1391-407a-9986-f8b0234f0866.title: DOM: Node Rendering
8eeedefa-1391-407a-9986-f8b0234f0866.body:
NoteNode component. Absolutely positioned div.

**Reads:** mergedNotes → x, y, w, h → CSS left/top/width/min-height
**Contains:** drag handle, title input, MarkdownEditor (CodeMirror), ConnectionHandle, resize handle, context menu

**Events emitted up:** onPointerDown → selection + drag, onContextMenu, title onBlur

13776ffa-32c9-4a7f-89c1-718a93736cc0.title: DOM: Edge Rendering
13776ffa-32c9-4a7f-89c1-718a93736cc0.body:
FreeformEdge component. SVG `<line>` elements.

**Reads:** mergedNotes → getAbsoluteRect → rectBorderIntersection → from/to coordinates
**Renders:** hit area line (transparent, wide) + visible line (stroke)
**Events:** dblclick for label editing

Reactive chain: mergedNotes() changes → from()/to() recompute → SVG attributes update

e51cd308-3f5f-4eca-8bdd-1e7079e4dd46.title: DOM: Canvas Container
e51cd308-3f5f-4eca-8bdd-1e7079e4dd46.body:
Root div managed by cactus Canvas component.

**Layers (DOM order):**
1. DotGrid background (SVG pattern)
2. Edge SVG (position: absolute)
3. Nodes div (position: absolute, CSS transform from viewport)
4. Connection preview SVG
5. Selection rect div

d3-zoom attached here. Filters `[data-no-pan]` elements from pan/zoom.
